ROOM 220, JUDGE CHOPPELAS, SSAWYER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. 9:37 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF. PRESENT W/ COUNSEL GUADALUPE GAMINO, DEFT PRESENT W/ COUNSEL LAWRENCE MANNING. CASE SETTLED TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOW: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR REST. & POSS OF THE PREM. LOCATED AT 334 SAN CARLOS, SF, CA, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER MIDNIGHT 3/30/98 ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT AFTER MIDNIGHT 3/30/98 IS DEEMED ABANDONED AND CAN BE DISPOSED OF BY PLTF. PLTF. WAIVES ANY AND ALL RENTS THRU 3/30/98, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS/FEES. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO DEFT FOR APPROVAL. BOTH PLTF. & DEFT AGREED TO THE TERMS AS STATED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCHA, AUXILIADORA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 334 SAN CARLOS, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL MAR-30-1998, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
